ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone(s) of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the state data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_data" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data belongs to */,
  "exercise_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of people who exercise regularly */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the exercise data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "good_health_data" (
  "good_health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each good health data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data belongs to */,
  "good_health_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of people with good health */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the good health data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("good_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_good_health_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obese_data" (
  "obese_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obesity data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data belongs to */,
  "obese_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of people who are obese */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the obesity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obese_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obese_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obesity_percent_data" (
  "obesity_percent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obesity percentage data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data belongs to */,
  "obesity_percent" REAL /* Obesity percentage for the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the obesity percentage data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obesity_percent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obesity_percent_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overweight_data" (
  "overweight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overweight data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data belongs to */,
  "overweight_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of people who are overweight */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the overweight data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overweight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overweight_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_rate_data" (
  "poverty_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty rate data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data belongs to */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the poverty rate data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_rate_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "health_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the data belongs to */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exercise data for the state */,
  "good_health_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the good health data for the state */,
  "obese_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the obesity data for the state */,
  "obesity_percent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the obesity percentage data for the state */,
  "overweight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the overweight data for the state */,
  "poverty_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poverty rate data for the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the health statistics were collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the health statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercise_data ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_poverty_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("poverty_rate_id") REFERENCES poverty_rate_data ("poverty_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_good_health_id FOREIGN KEY ("good_health_id") REFERENCES good_health_data ("good_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_obesity_percent_id FOREIGN KEY ("obesity_percent_id") REFERENCES obesity_percent_data ("obesity_percent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_obese_id FOREIGN KEY ("obese_id") REFERENCES obese_data ("obese_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_overweight_id FOREIGN KEY ("overweight_id") REFERENCES overweight_data ("overweight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "health_statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the health statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the health statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_health_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_statistic_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("health_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "research_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the research team was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the research team data was last updated */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader (reference to `users` table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_team_members" (
  "research_team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team member */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a member of the team */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the research team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the user within the research team (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_team_members_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team that authored the publication (reference to `research_teams` table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id")
)
